message: All drill-down link acceptance criteria are already implemented: WorkerInfo and CompletionRecord have run_id fields, DashboardState.snapshot() exposes run_id in the SSE payload, list_completions() returns run_id from the DB, the completions table has a run_id column, the supervisor polls for run_ids via _refresh_worker_run_ids(), dashboard.html templates include trace-link anchors, dashboard.js renders the links when run_id is present pointing to /proxy?trace_id=<run_id>, and the /proxy route accepts the trace_id filter. No changes were needed.
